description: Fine-tune SOTA open legal NLP models and general-purpose models on NZ legislative and Hansard corpora. Covers Legal-BERT, SaulLM, Gemma, Phi-4, Qwen, Mistral, Exaone, MiniCPM5, Liquid, Kimi.
oracle_notes: Repo-side Track 20 implementation is complete: training data preparation, task examples, MLM collator, metrics, Legal-BERT/QLoRA job specs, dry-run CLI evidence, fine-tuning scripts, dependency declarations, focused tests, environment-adaptive runtime planning, bounded CPU smoke training, real PipelineRecord Parquet CPU smoke training, and an explicit external gate manifest. Local gate evidence finds 519 Parquet inputs, importable training dependencies, and the hf CLI in the Pixi runtime. This workstation selects a bounded local_cpu plan and runs a 5-step smoke training loop with decreasing loss; CI=true selects a ci_cpu plan and runs a 2-step smoke training loop with decreasing loss. Full-scale model-quality claims remain external gates until production-scale Legal-BERT/QLoRA training and held-out evaluation are run on the best available backend.
